    '+totalLitros.toLocaleString('es',{maximumFractionDigits:0})+'
    litros de combustible
    '+ '
    Total Gasto
    $'+totalMonto.toLocaleString('es',{maximumFractionDigits:2})+'
    en combustible
    '+ '
    Periodo
    '+fechas[0]+' a '+fechas[fechas.length-1]+'
    '+(fechas.length)+' dias con datos
    '+ '
    '+ '

    Los datos de Combustible y Dashboard se han actualizado automaticamente.

    '; destroyAllCharts(); renderDashboard(); renderCombustible(); }catch(err){ status.innerHTML='
    ⚠ Error al procesar: '+err.message+'
    '; } }; reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file); } (function(){try{const s=localStorage.getItem('combustibleData');if(s){combustible=JSON.parse(s)}}catch(e){}})(); // ===== REEMPLAZO ===== function renderReemplazo(){ const currentYear=2026; const currentMonth=2; // Febrero 2026 based on data // Build vehicle scores const repByPlaca={}; reparaciones.forEach(r=>{ const p=r.placa; if(!repByPlaca[p])repByPlaca[p]={count:0,total:0,items:[]}; repByPlaca[p].count++; repByPlaca[p].total+=parseFloat(r.costo)||0; repByPlaca[p].items.push(r); }); // Also count costos (maintenance) as fallas const costByPlaca={}; costos.forEach(c=>{ const p=c.placa; if(!costByPlaca[p])costByPlaca[p]={count:0,total:0}; costByPlaca[p].count++; costByPlaca[p].total+=parseFloat(c.costo)||0; }); const scored=flota.map(v=>{ const age=currentYear-parseInt(v.ano||currentYear); // Antigüedad: 25 pts max, 10+ años = máximo const ageScore=Math.min(25,Math.round((age/10)*25)); // Costo reparaciones: 30 pts max, $2000+ = máximo const repData=repByPlaca[v.placa]||{count:0,total:0}; const costData=costByPlaca[v.placa]||{count:0,total:0}; const totalRepCost=repData.total; const costScore=Math.min(30,Math.round((totalRepCost/2000)*30)); // Frecuencia fallas: 25 pts max, 6+ visitas = máximo const totalVisits=repData.count+costData.count; const freqScore=Math.min(25,Math.round((totalVisits/6)*25)); // Kilometraje estimado: 20 pts max, 200k+ = máximo (estimate based on age) const estKm=age*20000; // ~20k km/year estimate const kmScore=Math.min(20,Math.round((estKm/200000)*20)); const totalScore=ageScore+costScore+freqScore+kmScore; let urgency,urgColor; if(totalScore>=70){urgency='Crítico';urgColor='#ef4444'} else if(totalScore>=50){urgency='Alto';urgColor='#f59e0b'} else if(totalScore>=30){urgency='Medio';urgColor='#3b82f6'} else{urgency='Bajo';urgColor='#22c55e'} return {...v,age,ageScore,costScore,freqScore,kmScore,totalScore,urgency,urgColor,totalRepCost:repData.total,totalVisits,estKm}; }).sort((a,b)=>b.totalScore-a.totalScore); const critico=scored.filter(s=>s.totalScore>=70).length; const alto=scored.filter(s=>s.totalScore>=50&&s.totalScore<70).length; const medio=scored.filter(s=>s.totalScore>=30&&s.totalScore<50).length; const bajo=scored.filter(s=>s.totalScore<30).length; const avgScore=scored.length?Math.round(scored.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.totalScore,0)/scored.length):0; const totalRepGasto=scored.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.totalRepCost,0); // Get unique divisions const divisions=[...new Set(flota.map(v=>v.empresa))].sort(); const container=document.getElementById('reemplazoContent'); container.innerHTML=`

    📈 Análisis de Reemplazo Vehicular

    Cuándo cambiar cada vehículo basado en 4 criterios clave

    Reemplazo Crítico
    ${critico}
    Puntuación 70+
    Prioridad Alta
    ${alto}
    Puntuación 50-69
    Score Promedio
    ${avgScore}
    De 100 puntos
    Gasto Total Reparaciones
    $${totalRepGasto.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2})}
    Acumulado en la flota

    📊 Distribución por Urgencia

    Crítico (70+): ${critico} Alto (50-69): ${alto} Medio (30-49): ${medio} Bajo (0-29): ${bajo}

    📊 Top Vehículos por Gasto en Reparaciones

    📚 Metodología de Puntuación (0-100)

    ⏰
    Antigüedad
    25 pts
    10+ años = máximo
    💰
    Costo Reparaciones
    30 pts
    $2,000+ = máximo
    🔧
    Frecuencia Fallas
    25 pts
    6+ visitas = máximo
    🚗
    Kilometraje Est.
    20 pts
    200k+ km = máximo
    #VehículoPlacaAñoDivisiónConductorScoreAntigüedadCosto Rep.FrecuenciaKm Est.Gasto TotalUrgencia
    Total: ${scored.length} vehículos
    `; // Urgency color map for light theme const urgBadge={Crítico:{bg:'#ffebee',color:'#c62828'},Alto:{bg:'#fff3e0',color:'#e65100'},Medio:{bg:'#e3f2fd',color:'#1565c0'},Bajo:{bg:'#e8f5e9',color:'#2e7d32'}}; function renderTable(data){ const tbody=document.getElementById('rzTableBody'); tbody.innerHTML=data.map((v,i)=>{ const ub=urgBadge[v.urgency]; return ` ${i+1} ${v.modelo} ${v.placa} ${v.ano} ${v.empresa} ${v.conductor} ${v.totalScore}
    ${v.ageScore}/25 ${v.costScore}/30 ${v.freqScore}/25 ${v.kmScore}/20 $${v.totalRepCost.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2})} ${v.urgency} `}).join(''); document.getElementById('rzCount').textContent=data.length; } renderTable(scored); // Filters let activeUrg='',searchTerm='',divFilter=''; function applyFilters(){ let filtered=scored; if(activeUrg)filtered=filtered.filter(v=>v.urgency===activeUrg); if(divFilter)filtered=filtered.filter(v=>v.empresa===divFilter); if(searchTerm){const s=searchTerm.toLowerCase();filtered=filtered.filter(v=>(v.placa+v.modelo+v.conductor).toLowerCase().includes(s))} renderTable(filtered); } document.querySelectorAll('#rzFilters .rz-fbtn').forEach(btn=>{ btn.addEventListener('click',()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#rzFilters .rz-fbtn').forEach(b=>{b.style.background='var(--card)';b.style.color='var(--text)'}); btn.style.background='var(--primary)';btn.style.color='#fff'; activeUrg=btn.dataset.urg; applyFilters(); }); }); document.getElementById('rzSearch').addEventListener('input',e=>{searchTerm=e.target.value;applyFilters()}); document.getElementById('rzDivision').addEventListener('change',e=>{divFilter=e.target.value;applyFilters()}); // Charts safeChart('rzChartUrgency',{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:['Crítico (70+)','Alto (50-69)','Medio (30-49)','Bajo (0-29)'],datasets:[{data:[critico,alto,medio,bajo],backgroundColor:['#c62828','#f57f17','#1565c0','#2e7d32'],borderWidth:2,borderColor:'#fff'}]},options:{responsive:true,cutout:'65%',plugins:{legend:{display:false}}}}); const top8=scored.filter(v=>v.totalRepCost>0).slice(0,8); safeChart('rzChartTopGasto',{type:'bar',data:{labels:top8.map(v=>v.modelo),datasets:[{data:top8.map(v=>v.totalRepCost),backgroundColor:'#c62828',borderRadius:4,barThickness:28}]},options:{responsive:true,indexAxis:'y',plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{ticks:{callback:v=>'$'+v}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:11}}}}}}); } // ===== GPS TRACKING ===== let gpsMap=null, gpsMarkers={}, gpsUnitsData=[], gpsAutoRefresh=null; const SKYDATA_API='https://acceso.skydatalatam.com/api/v1/'; const SKYDATA_KEY='45e4305ce0850c7a2a6182ff0f9edded49605029'; function initGPSMap(){ if(gpsMap) return; gpsMap=L.map('gpsMap',{zoomControl:true}).setView([8.98,-79.52],10); L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png',{ attribution:'© OpenStreetMap',maxZoom:19 }).addTo(gpsMap); } function getStateInfo(state){ if(!state||!state.name) return {label:'Desconocido',color:'#9e9e9e',bg:'#f5f5f5',icon:'?'}; switch(state.name){ case 'driving': return {label:'En movimiento',color:'#2e7d32',bg:'#e8f5e9',icon:'▶'}; case 'stopped': return {label:'Detenido',color:'#f57f17',bg:'#fff8e1',icon:'■'}; case 'idle': return {label:'Motor encendido',color:'#1565c0',bg:'#e3f2fd',icon:'●'}; case 'nodata': return {label:'Sin datos',color:'#c62828',bg:'#ffebee',icon:'✕'}; default: return {label:state.name,color:'#757575',bg:'#f5f5f5',icon:'?'}; } } function formatDuration(seconds){ if(!seconds||seconds<0) return '--'; const h=Math.floor(seconds/3600); const m=Math.floor((seconds%3600)/60); if(h>24){const d=Math.floor(h/24);return d+'d '+(h%24)+'h'} if(h>0) return h+'h '+m+'m'; return m+'min'; } // Build fleet lookup indexes once const _flotaByVin={}, _flotaByPlaca={}, _flotaByPlacaNorm={}; function buildFlotaIndex(){ flota.forEach(v=>{ const vin=(v.chasis||'').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,''); const placa=(v.placa||'').trim().toUpperCase(); const placaNorm=placa.replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,''); if(vin) _flotaByVin[vin]=v; if(placa) _flotaByPlaca[placa]=v; if(placaNorm) _flotaByPlacaNorm[placaNorm]=v; }); } buildFlotaIndex(); function matchFlotaUnit(unit){ // 1) Match by VIN/chasis (most reliable) const vin=(unit.vin||'').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,''); if(vin&&_flotaByVin[vin]) return _flotaByVin[vin]; // 2) Extract plate from SkyData "number" field // Formats: "5-979487", "6-AF8992", "AT4665", "MJ4448" const rawNum=(unit.number||'').trim().toUpperCase(); const stripped=rawNum.replace(/^\d+-/,''); // remove prefix like "5-" const normNum=stripped.replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,''); // Direct plate match if(stripped&&_flotaByPlaca[stripped]) return _flotaByPlaca[stripped]; // Normalized match (handles spaces, hyphens in fleet data) if(normNum&&_flotaByPlacaNorm[normNum]) return _flotaByPlacaNorm[normNum]; // 3) Fuzzy: check if fleet plate is contained in GPS number or vice versa for(const v of flota){ const fPlaca=(v.placa||'').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,''); if(!fPlaca||!normNum) continue; if(fPlaca.length>=4&&normNum.length>=4&&(fPlaca.includes(normNum)||normNum.includes(fPlaca))) return v; } return null; } async function loadGPSData(){ try{ const resp=await fetch(SKYDATA_API+'unit/list.json?key='+SKYDATA_KEY); if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('Error API: '+resp.status); const json=await resp.json(); const units=json.data?.units||json.units||json.data||[]; if(!Array.isArray(units)) throw new Error('Formato de respuesta inesperado'); gpsUnitsData=units.map(u=>{ const matched=matchFlotaUnit(u); return { ...u, flotaMatch:matched, vinculado:!!matched, conductor:matched?matched.conductor:'Sin asignar', empresa:matched?matched.empresa:'--', placaFlota:matched?matched.placa:(u.number||'').replace(/^\d+-/,''), area:matched?matched.area:'--', tipo:matched?matched.tipo:'--', statusFlota:matched?matched.status:'--', numFlota:matched?matched.num:'--', stateInfo:getStateInfo(u.state||u.movement_state) }; }).sort((a,b)=>{ const order={driving:0,idle:1,stopped:2,nodata:3}; return (order[a.state?.name]??9)-(order[b.state?.name]??9); }); renderGPSContent(); initRptVehicleSelect(); document.getElementById('gpsSubtitle').textContent=gpsUnitsData.length+' unidades rastreadas via SkyData'; document.getElementById('gpsLastUpdate').textContent='Actualizado: '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-PA'); }catch(err){ document.getElementById('gpsSubtitle').textContent='Error: '+err.message; document.getElementById('gpsVehicleList').innerHTML='

    ⚠

    '+err.message+'

    Verifica la conexion a internet y el token API

    '; } } function renderGPSContent(){ const units=getFilteredGPS(); const driving=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.state?.name==='driving').length; const stopped=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.state?.name==='stopped'||u.state?.name==='idle').length; const nodata=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.state?.name==='nodata').length; const maxSpeed=Math.max(0,...gpsUnitsData.map(u=>u.speed||0)); const avgSpeed=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.speed>0); const avg=avgSpeed.length?Math.round(avgSpeed.reduce((a,b)=>a+(b.speed||0),0)/avgSpeed.length):0; const vinculados=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.vinculado).length; const sinVincular=gpsUnitsData.length-vinculados; document.getElementById('gpsKpiGrid').innerHTML=`
    ${driving}
    En Movimiento
    ${stopped}
    Detenidos
    ${nodata}
    Sin Datos
    ${gpsUnitsData.length}
    Total Unidades GPS
    ${vinculados}/${gpsUnitsData.length}
    Vinculados a Flota
    ${maxSpeed} km/h
    Vel. Maxima Actual
    `; document.getElementById('gpsVehicleCount').textContent=units.length; document.getElementById('gpsOnlineCount').textContent=driving+' en movimiento'; // Empresa filter const empresas=[...new Set(gpsUnitsData.map(u=>u.empresa).filter(e=>e&&e!=='--'))].sort(); const selEmp=document.getElementById('gpsFilterEmpresa'); const curVal=selEmp.value; selEmp.innerHTML=''+empresas.map(e=>'').join(''); // Vehicle list document.getElementById('gpsVehicleList').innerHTML=units.length?units.map(u=>{ const si=u.stateInfo; return `
    ${u.label}
    ${u.placaFlota} · ${u.conductor}
    ${u.empresa}${u.area&&u.area!=='--'?' · '+u.area:''}
    ${u.speed?u.speed+' km/h':si.label}
    ${u.vinculado?'
    ✓ Vinculado
    ':'
    No vinculado
    '}
    `; }).join(''):'
    No se encontraron vehiculos
    '; // Table document.getElementById('gpsTableBody').innerHTML=units.map((u,i)=>{ const si=u.stateInfo; const lastUp=u.last_update?new Date(u.last_update).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'; const km=u.mileage?Math.round(u.mileage/1000).toLocaleString():'--'; return ` ${i+1} ${u.numFlota!=='--'?u.numFlota:''} ${u.label} ${u.placaFlota} ${u.conductor} ${u.empresa} ${u.area!=='--'?u.area:''} ${si.label} ${u.speed?u.speed+' km/h':'0'} ${km} km ${lastUp} ${u.vinculado?'✓ Si':'✗ No'} `}).join(''); // Map markers updateGPSMarkers(units); } function updateGPSMarkers(units){ // Remove old markers Object.values(gpsMarkers).forEach(m=>gpsMap.removeLayer(m)); gpsMarkers={}; const bounds=[]; units.forEach(u=>{ if(!u.lat||!u.lng) return; const si=u.stateInfo; const icon=L.divIcon({ className:'', html:`
    ${u.state?.name==='driving'?'▶':u.state?.name==='stopped'||u.state?.name==='idle'?'■':'✕'}
    ${u.placaFlota}
    `, iconSize:[32,32],iconAnchor:[16,16] }); const lastUp=u.last_update?new Date(u.last_update).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'; const km=u.mileage?Math.round(u.mileage/1000).toLocaleString():'--'; const dur=formatDuration(u.state?.duration); const marker=L.marker([u.lat,u.lng],{icon}).addTo(gpsMap); marker.bindPopup(`
    ${u.label}
    ${u.vinculado?'VINCULADO':''}
    Placa:${u.placaFlota} Conductor:${u.conductor} Empresa:${u.empresa} ${u.area!=='--'?'Area:'+u.area+'':''} Estado:${si.label} En este estado:${dur} Velocidad:${u.speed||0} km/h Km Total:${km} km Actualizado:${lastUp}
    `,{maxWidth:320}); marker.on('click',()=>selectGPSUnit(u.unit_id)); gpsMarkers[u.unit_id]=marker; bounds.push([u.lat,u.lng]); }); const allBounds=[]; gpsUnitsData.forEach(u=>{if(u.lat&&u.lng) allBounds.push([u.lat,u.lng])}); if(allBounds.length) gpsMap.fitBounds(allBounds,{padding:[40,40],maxZoom:13}); } function selectGPSUnit(uid){ const u=gpsUnitsData.find(x=>x.unit_id===uid); if(!u) return; // Highlight in list document.querySelectorAll('.gps-vehicle-item').forEach(el=>{ el.classList.toggle('selected',el.dataset.uid==uid); }); // Center map if(u.lat&&u.lng){ gpsMap.setView([u.lat,u.lng],16,{animate:true}); if(gpsMarkers[uid]) gpsMarkers[uid].openPopup(); } // Detail panel const si=u.stateInfo; const lastUp=u.last_update?new Date(u.last_update).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'; const km=u.mileage?Math.round(u.mileage/1000).toLocaleString():'--'; const dur=formatDuration(u.state?.duration); const ignH=u.ignition_total_time?Math.round(u.ignition_total_time/3600).toLocaleString():'--'; const panel=document.getElementById('gpsDetailPanel'); panel.style.display='block'; const fm=u.flotaMatch; panel.innerHTML=`

    🚗 ${u.label} ${u.numFlota!=='--'?'#'+u.numFlota+'':''}

    Placa: ${u.placaFlota} · Conductor: ${u.conductor} · ${u.empresa}${u.area!=='--'?' · '+u.area:''}

    ${u.vinculado?'✓ Vinculado a Flota':'⚠ No vinculado'} ${si.icon} ${si.label}
    ${u.vinculado?`
    Conductor: ${u.conductor}
    Empresa: ${u.empresa}
    Area: ${u.area}
    Tipo: ${u.tipo}
    Status Flota: ${u.statusFlota}
    ${fm?`
    Ubicacion asignada: ${fm.lugar||'--'}
    `:''}
    `:''}
    Velocidad Actual
    ${u.speed||0} km/h
    Direccion
    ${u.direction||0}°
    Kilometraje Total
    ${km} km
    Tiempo en Estado
    ${dur}
    Horas Motor Total
    ${ignH} h
    Ultima Actualizacion
    ${lastUp}
    VIN / Chasis
    ${u.vin||'--'}
    Coordenadas
    ${u.lat?.toFixed(5)}, ${u.lng?.toFixed(5)}
    `; } function getFilteredGPS(){ let data=[...gpsUnitsData]; const search=(document.getElementById('gpsSearch')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const status=document.getElementById('gpsFilterStatus')?.value||''; const empresa=document.getElementById('gpsFilterEmpresa')?.value||''; if(search) data=data.filter(u=>(u.label+u.placaFlota+u.conductor+u.empresa+(u.number||'')).toLowerCase().includes(search)); if(status) data=data.filter(u=>u.state?.name===status); if(empresa) data=data.filter(u=>u.empresa===empresa); return data; } function renderGPS(){ initGPSMap(); loadGPSData(); // Auto-refresh every 60 seconds if(gpsAutoRefresh) clearInterval(gpsAutoRefresh); gpsAutoRefresh=setInterval(loadGPSData,60000); // Filters ['gpsSearch','gpsFilterStatus','gpsFilterEmpresa'].forEach(id=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.addEventListener(el.tagName==='INPUT'?'input':'change',()=>renderGPSContent()); }); // Fix map render on page show and fit all vehicles setTimeout(()=>{ if(gpsMap){ gpsMap.invalidateSize(); const bounds=[]; Object.values(gpsMarkers).forEach(m=>{const ll=m.getLatLng();bounds.push([ll.lat,ll.lng])}); if(bounds.length) gpsMap.fitBounds(bounds,{padding:[30,30],maxZoom:14}); } },200); } // ===== REPORTES DE CONDUCCION ===== let rptRouteMap=null,rptRouteLayer=null,rptMarkerLayer=null; let rptCurrentData=[]; function initRptVehicleSelect(){ const sel=document.getElementById('rptVehicle'); if(!sel||!gpsUnitsData.length) return; sel.innerHTML=''+ gpsUnitsData.map(u=>``).join(''); } function getRptDates(){ const quick=document.getElementById('rptQuick').value; const now=new Date(); let from,till; if(quick==='custom'){ from=document.getElementById('rptFrom').value; till=document.getElementById('rptTill').value; if(!from||!till) return null; return {from:from+'T00:00:00Z',till:till+'T23:59:59Z'}; } till=new Date(now);till.setHours(23,59,59); from=new Date(now); switch(quick){ case 'today': from.setHours(0,0,0); break; case 'yesterday': from.setDate(from.getDate()-1);from.setHours(0,0,0);till=new Date(from);till.setHours(23,59,59); break; case '7d': from.setDate(from.getDate()-6);from.setHours(0,0,0); break; case '15d': from.setDate(from.getDate()-14);from.setHours(0,0,0); break; case '30d': from.setDate(from.getDate()-29);from.setHours(0,0,0); break; } return {from:from.toISOString().replace(/\.\d+Z/,'Z'),till:till.toISOString().replace(/\.\d+Z/,'Z')}; } document.getElementById('rptQuick')?.addEventListener('change',function(){ const custom=this.value==='custom'; document.getElementById('rptFrom').style.display=custom?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('rptTill').style.display=custom?'block':'none'; }); // Init hidden document.getElementById('rptFrom')&&(document.getElementById('rptFrom').style.display='none'); document.getElementById('rptTill')&&(document.getElementById('rptTill').style.display='none'); async function loadDrivingReport(){ const unitId=document.getElementById('rptVehicle').value; if(!unitId){alert('Selecciona un vehiculo');return} const dates=getRptDates(); if(!dates){alert('Selecciona las fechas');return} document.getElementById('rptLoading').style.display='block'; document.getElementById('rptContent').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('rptEmpty').style.display='none'; try{ const url=SKYDATA_API+'route/list.json?key='+SKYDATA_KEY+'&unit_id='+unitId+'&from='+dates.from+'&till='+dates.till; const resp=await fetch(url); if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('Error API: '+resp.status); const json=await resp.json(); const unitData=json.data?.units?.[0]; if(!unitData||!unitData.routes||!unitData.routes.length){ document.getElementById('rptLoading').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('rptEmpty').style.display='block'; document.getElementById('rptEmpty').innerHTML='
    📋

    No se encontraron recorridos en el periodo seleccionado

    '; return; } rptCurrentData=unitData.routes; const unitInfo=gpsUnitsData.find(u=>u.unit_id==unitId); renderDrivingReport(unitInfo); document.getElementById('rptLoading').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('rptContent').style.display='block'; }catch(err){ document.getElementById('rptLoading').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('rptEmpty').style.display='block'; document.getElementById('rptEmpty').innerHTML='
    ⚠

    '+err.message+'

    '; } } function renderDrivingReport(unitInfo){ const routes=rptCurrentData.filter(r=>r.type==='route'); const stops=rptCurrentData.filter(r=>r.type==='stop'); const totalKm=routes.reduce((a,r)=>a+(r.distance||0),0)/1000; const totalTrips=routes.length; const totalStops=stops.length; const maxSpeed=Math.max(0,...routes.map(r=>r.max_speed||0)); const avgSpeed=routes.length?Math.round(routes.reduce((a,r)=>a+(r.avg_speed||0),0)/routes.length):0; // Total driving time let totalDriveSeconds=0; routes.forEach(r=>{ if(r.start?.time&&r.end?.time){ totalDriveSeconds+=(new Date(r.end.time)-new Date(r.start.time))/1000; } }); // Total stop time let totalStopSeconds=0; stops.forEach(r=>{ if(r.start?.time&&r.end?.time){ totalStopSeconds+=(new Date(r.end.time)-new Date(r.start.time))/1000; } }); const longestTrip=routes.reduce((mx,r)=>(r.distance||0)>mx?r.distance:mx,0)/1000; const vehName=unitInfo?(unitInfo.label+' - '+unitInfo.placaFlota):'Vehiculo'; // Summary KPIs document.getElementById('rptSummaryGrid').innerHTML=`
    ${totalKm.toFixed(1)}
    Km Recorridos
    ${totalTrips}
    Viajes Realizados
    ${totalStops}
    Paradas
    ${maxSpeed}
    Vel. Maxima (km/h)
    ${avgSpeed}
    Vel. Promedio (km/h)
    ${formatDuration(totalDriveSeconds)}
    Tiempo Conduciendo
    ${formatDuration(totalStopSeconds)}
    Tiempo Detenido
    ${longestTrip.toFixed(1)}
    Viaje Mas Largo (km)
    `; // Tab events document.querySelectorAll('#rptTabBar button').forEach(btn=>{ btn.onclick=()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#rptTabBar button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); renderRptTab(btn.dataset.tab,unitInfo); }; }); renderRptTab('resumen',unitInfo); } function renderRptTab(tab,unitInfo){ const container=document.getElementById('rptTabContent'); const routes=rptCurrentData.filter(r=>r.type==='route'); const stops=rptCurrentData.filter(r=>r.type==='stop'); if(tab==='resumen') renderRptResumen(container,routes,stops); else if(tab==='recorridos') renderRptRecorridos(container,routes); else if(tab==='paradas') renderRptParadas(container,stops); else if(tab==='conduccion') renderRptConduccion(container,routes,stops,unitInfo); else if(tab==='mapa') renderRptMapa(container,unitInfo); else if(tab==='tabla') renderRptTabla(container); } function renderRptResumen(container,routes,stops){ // Group by day const days={}; rptCurrentData.forEach(r=>{ const d=r.start?.time?.substring(0,10); if(!d) return; if(!days[d]) days[d]={routes:[],stops:[],km:0,trips:0,maxSpd:0,driveTime:0,stopTime:0}; if(r.type==='route'){ days[d].routes.push(r); days[d].km+=(r.distance||0)/1000; days[d].trips++; days[d].maxSpd=Math.max(days[d].maxSpd,r.max_speed||0); if(r.start?.time&&r.end?.time) days[d].driveTime+=(new Date(r.end.time)-new Date(r.start.time))/1000; } else { days[d].stops.push(r); if(r.start?.time&&r.end?.time) days[d].stopTime+=(new Date(r.end.time)-new Date(r.start.time))/1000; } }); const sortedDays=Object.keys(days).sort().reverse(); // Chart data const chartLabels=sortedDays.map(d=>new Date(d+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('es-PA',{weekday:'short',day:'numeric',month:'short'})).reverse(); const chartKm=sortedDays.map(d=>+days[d].km.toFixed(1)).reverse(); const chartTrips=sortedDays.map(d=>days[d].trips).reverse(); container.innerHTML=`

    📊 Kilometros por Dia

    📊 Viajes por Dia

    📅 Resumen Diario

    ${sortedDays.map(d=>{ const day=days[d]; const avgSpd=day.routes.length?Math.round(day.routes.reduce((a,r)=>a+(r.avg_speed||0),0)/day.routes.length):0; return ``; }).join('')}
    FechaKm RecorridosViajesParadasVel. MaxTiempo ConduccionTiempo Detenido
    ${new Date(d+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('es-PA',{weekday:'long',day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'})} ${day.km.toFixed(1)} km ${day.trips} ${day.stops.length} ${day.maxSpd} km/h ${formatDuration(day.driveTime)} ${formatDuration(day.stopTime)}
    `; // Charts safeChart('rptChartKmDay',{type:'bar',data:{labels:chartLabels,datasets:[{label:'Km',data:chartKm,backgroundColor:'#1a237e',borderRadius:6,barThickness:28}]},options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{callback:v=>v+' km'}},x:{grid:{display:false}}}}}); safeChart('rptChartTripsDay',{type:'bar',data:{labels:chartLabels,datasets:[{label:'Viajes',data:chartTrips,backgroundColor:'#ff6f00',borderRadius:6,barThickness:28}]},options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{stepSize:1}},x:{grid:{display:false}}}}}); } function renderRptRecorridos(container,routes){ container.innerHTML=`

    ${routes.length} recorridos encontrados

    `; function renderTrips(sort){ let sorted=[...routes]; if(sort==='distance') sorted.sort((a,b)=>(b.distance||0)-(a.distance||0)); else if(sort==='speed') sorted.sort((a,b)=>(b.max_speed||0)-(a.max_speed||0)); else sorted.sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.start?.time||0)-new Date(a.start?.time||0)); document.getElementById('rptTripsList').innerHTML=sorted.map((r,i)=>{ const km=((r.distance||0)/1000).toFixed(1); const dur=r.start?.time&&r.end?.time?formatDuration((new Date(r.end.time)-new Date(r.start.time))/1000):'--'; const startTime=r.start?.time?new Date(r.start.time).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'; const spdColor=r.max_speed>100?'var(--danger)':r.max_speed>80?'var(--warning)':'var(--success)'; return `
    ${i+1}
    ${km} km
    ${startTime}
    ▲ ${r.avg_speed||0} km/h prom ▲ ${r.max_speed||0} km/h max
    📍 ${r.start?.address||'--'} ➡ ${r.end?.address||'En curso...'} ⏱ ${dur}
    `; }).join(''); } renderTrips('time'); document.getElementById('rptSortTrips').onchange=function(){renderTrips(this.value)}; } function renderRptParadas(container,stops){ // Group by address const addrMap={}; stops.forEach(s=>{ const addr=s.start?.address||'Desconocido'; if(!addrMap[addr]) addrMap[addr]={count:0,totalTime:0,lat:s.start?.lat,lng:s.start?.lng,visits:[]}; addrMap[addr].count++; const dur=s.start?.time&&s.end?.time?(new Date(s.end.time)-new Date(s.start.time))/1000:0; addrMap[addr].totalTime+=dur; addrMap[addr].visits.push({from:s.start?.time,to:s.end?.time,dur}); }); const addrList=Object.entries(addrMap).sort((a,b)=>b[1].count-a[1].count); container.innerHTML=`

    ${stops.length} paradas en ${addrList.length} ubicaciones distintas

    📍 Ubicaciones Mas Frecuentes

    ⏱ Tiempo Total por Ubicacion

    📍 Detalle de Paradas por Ubicacion

    ${addrList.map((a,i)=>``).join('')}
    #UbicacionVisitasTiempo TotalPromedio por VisitaCoordenadas
    ${i+1} ${a[0]} ${a[1].count} ${formatDuration(a[1].totalTime)} ${formatDuration(a[1].totalTime/a[1].count)} ${a[1].lat?.toFixed(4)}, ${a[1].lng?.toFixed(4)}

    📅 Historial Cronologico de Paradas

    ${stops.map((s,i)=>{ const dur=s.start?.time&&s.end?.time?formatDuration((new Date(s.end.time)-new Date(s.start.time))/1000):'--'; return ``; }).join('')}
    #InicioFinDuracionUbicacion
    ${i+1} ${s.start?.time?new Date(s.start.time).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'} ${s.end?.time?new Date(s.end.time).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'} ${dur} ${s.start?.address||'--'}
    `; // Charts const top8=addrList.slice(0,8); const shortLabel=a=>a.length>35?a.substring(0,32)+'...':a; safeChart('rptChartStopFreq',{type:'bar',data:{labels:top8.map(a=>shortLabel(a[0])),datasets:[{data:top8.map(a=>a[1].count),backgroundColor:'#ff6f00',borderRadius:6,barThickness:22}]},options:{responsive:true,indexAxis:'y',plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{stepSize:1}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:10}}}}}}); safeChart('rptChartStopTime',{type:'bar',data:{labels:top8.map(a=>shortLabel(a[0])),datasets:[{data:top8.map(a=>+(a[1].totalTime/3600).toFixed(1)),backgroundColor:'#1565c0',borderRadius:6,barThickness:22}]},options:{responsive:true,indexAxis:'y',plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{callback:v=>v+'h'}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:10}}}}}}); } function renderRptConduccion(container,routes,stops,unitInfo){ // === ANALYSIS ENGINE === const SPEED_LIMIT_HIGH=100; // km/h - exceso grave const SPEED_LIMIT_MED=80; // km/h - exceso moderado const SPEED_LIMIT_LOW=60; // km/h - zona urbana const LONG_IDLE_MIN=45; // min - ralentí excesivo const SHORT_TRIP_M=500; // m - viaje muy corto const NIGHT_START=22; // hora inicio nocturno const NIGHT_END=5; // hora fin nocturno const LONG_DRIVE_MIN=120; // min - conducción continua sin parar // Infractions collection const infractions=[]; let totalSpeedEvents=0, severeSpeedEvents=0, moderateSpeedEvents=0; let nightDrivingEvents=0, nightKm=0; let longIdleEvents=0, totalIdleMin=0; let shortTripEvents=0; let longDriveEvents=0; let veryHighSpeedCount=0; // >120 // Daily tracking const dailyData={}; function getDay(t){return t?.substring(0,10)||'unknown'} function ensureDay(d){if(!dailyData[d]) dailyData[d]={speedEvents:[],nightEvents:0,nightKm:0,idleEvents:0,idleMin:0,shortTrips:0,longDrives:0,maxSpeed:0,totalKm:0,trips:0,infractions:[]}} // Analyze routes routes.forEach(r=>{ const day=getDay(r.start?.time); ensureDay(day); const km=(r.distance||0)/1000; const durSec=r.start?.time&&r.end?.time?(new Date(r.end.time)-new Date(r.start.time))/1000:0; const durMin=durSec/60; const startH=r.start?.time?new Date(r.start.time).getHours():-1; dailyData[day].totalKm+=km; dailyData[day].trips++; if(r.max_speed>dailyData[day].maxSpeed) dailyData[day].maxSpeed=r.max_speed||0; // 1) EXCESO DE VELOCIDAD if(r.max_speed>=SPEED_LIMIT_HIGH){ totalSpeedEvents++; const severity=r.max_speed>=120?'critico':r.max_speed>=SPEED_LIMIT_HIGH?'grave':'moderado'; if(r.max_speed>=120) veryHighSpeedCount++; if(r.max_speed>=SPEED_LIMIT_HIGH) severeSpeedEvents++; const inf={ type:'speed',severity, icon:'⚠', title:'Exceso de velocidad'+(r.max_speed>=120?' CRITICO':''), detail:`Vel. maxima ${r.max_speed} km/h (prom. ${r.avg_speed} km/h) en tramo de ${km.toFixed(1)} km`, location:r.start?.address||'--', time:r.start?.time, speed:r.max_speed, color:r.max_speed>=120?'#b71c1c':r.max_speed>=100?'#c62828':'#e65100' }; infractions.push(inf); dailyData[day].speedEvents.push(inf); } else if(r.max_speed>=SPEED_LIMIT_MED){ moderateSpeedEvents++; totalSpeedEvents++; const inf={ type:'speed',severity:'moderado', icon:'🚨', title:'Velocidad elevada', detail:`Vel. maxima ${r.max_speed} km/h (prom. ${r.avg_speed} km/h) en tramo de ${km.toFixed(1)} km`, location:r.start?.address||'--', time:r.start?.time, speed:r.max_speed, color:'#f57f17' }; infractions.push(inf); dailyData[day].speedEvents.push(inf); } // 2) CONDUCCION NOCTURNA if(startH>=NIGHT_START||startH=LONG_DRIVE_MIN){ longDriveEvents++; dailyData[day].longDrives++; infractions.push({ type:'fatigue',severity:'warn', icon:'😴', title:'Conduccion prolongada sin descanso', detail:`${formatDuration(durSec)} continuos (${km.toFixed(1)} km) — riesgo de fatiga`, location:r.start?.address||'--', time:r.start?.time, color:'#e65100' }); } }); // Analyze stops (idle) stops.forEach(s=>{ const day=getDay(s.start?.time); ensureDay(day); const durSec=s.start?.time&&s.end?.time?(new Date(s.end.time)-new Date(s.start.time))/1000:0; const durMin=durSec/60; if(durMin>=LONG_IDLE_MIN&&durMin<480){ // between 45min and 8h (exclude overnight) longIdleEvents++;totalIdleMin+=durMin; dailyData[day].idleEvents++;dailyData[day].idleMin+=durMin; infractions.push({ type:'idle',severity:'warn', icon:'⏲', title:'Parada prolongada en horario laboral', detail:`${formatDuration(durSec)} detenido — posible ralenti o inactividad`, location:s.start?.address||'--', time:s.start?.time, color:'#e65100' }); } }); // Sort infractions by time desc infractions.sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.time||0)-new Date(a.time||0)); // === SCORING (0-100, 100=perfect) === const totalTrips=routes.length; const speedPenalty=Math.min(40,severeSpeedEvents*8+moderateSpeedEvents*3+veryHighSpeedCount*12); const nightPenalty=Math.min(15,nightDrivingEvents*3); const idlePenalty=Math.min(15,longIdleEvents*3); const fatiguePenalty=Math.min(15,longDriveEvents*5); const shortPenalty=Math.min(15,shortTripEvents*2); const score=Math.max(0,100-speedPenalty-nightPenalty-idlePenalty-fatiguePenalty-shortPenalty); const scoreColor=score>=80?'#2e7d32':score>=60?'#f57f17':score>=40?'#e65100':'#c62828'; const scoreLabel=score>=80?'Excelente':score>=60?'Aceptable':score>=40?'Necesita mejorar':'Critico'; // Daily sorted const sortedDays=Object.keys(dailyData).filter(d=>d!=='unknown').sort().reverse(); const chartDays=sortedDays.slice().reverse(); const chartLabels=chartDays.map(d=>new Date(d+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('es-PA',{weekday:'short',day:'numeric',month:'short'})); // === RENDER === container.innerHTML=`
    ${score}
    ${scoreLabel}

    Score de Conduccion: ${unitInfo?unitInfo.label+' ('+unitInfo.placaFlota+')':''}

    Evaluacion basada en ${totalTrips} viajes durante el periodo seleccionado

    Velocidad: -${speedPenalty}pts Nocturno: -${nightPenalty}pts Ralenti: -${idlePenalty}pts Fatiga: -${fatiguePenalty}pts Eficiencia: -${shortPenalty}pts
    ⚠
    ${severeSpeedEvents+veryHighSpeedCount}
    Excesos graves
    🚨
    ${moderateSpeedEvents}
    Vel. elevada
    🌙
    ${nightDrivingEvents}
    Nocturnos
    ⏲
    ${longIdleEvents}
    Ralenti largo
    😴
    ${longDriveEvents}
    Sin descanso
    📏
    ${shortTripEvents}
    Viajes cortos

    ⚠ Excesos de Velocidad por Dia

    📈 Velocidad Maxima por Dia

    📊 Infracciones por Tipo

    📊 Score Diario de Conduccion

    📅 Comportamiento Diario

    FechaKmViajesVel. MaxExcesos Vel.NocturnosRalentiSin DescansoViajes CortosScore

    🚨 Registro de Eventos (${infractions.length})

    `; // Render daily behavior table const tbody=document.getElementById('rptBehaviorTableBody'); const dailyScores=[]; tbody.innerHTML=sortedDays.map(d=>{ const dd=dailyData[d]; const dSpd=Math.min(40,dd.speedEvents.length*6); const dNight=Math.min(15,dd.nightEvents*5); const dIdle=Math.min(15,dd.idleEvents*5); const dFat=Math.min(15,dd.longDrives*8); const dShort=Math.min(15,dd.shortTrips*3); const dScore=Math.max(0,100-dSpd-dNight-dIdle-dFat-dShort); dailyScores.push(dScore); const sc=dScore>=80?'#2e7d32':dScore>=60?'#f57f17':dScore>=40?'#e65100':'#c62828'; const spdColor=dd.maxSpeed>=120?'var(--danger)':dd.maxSpeed>=100?'var(--warning)':dd.maxSpeed>=80?'var(--accent)':'var(--success)'; return ` ${new Date(d+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('es-PA',{weekday:'short',day:'numeric',month:'short'})} ${dd.totalKm.toFixed(1)} km ${dd.trips} ${dd.maxSpeed} km/h ${dd.speedEvents.length?''+dd.speedEvents.length+'':'0'} ${dd.nightEvents||'0'} ${dd.idleEvents?dd.idleEvents+' ('+Math.round(dd.idleMin)+'min)':'0'} ${dd.longDrives||'0'} ${dd.shortTrips||'0'} ${dScore} `; }).join(''); // Infractions renderer function renderInfractions(typeFilter,sevFilter){ let filtered=infractions; if(typeFilter) filtered=filtered.filter(i=>i.type===typeFilter); if(sevFilter) filtered=filtered.filter(i=>i.severity===sevFilter); document.getElementById('rptInfractionsList').innerHTML=filtered.length?filtered.map(inf=>{ const cardClass=inf.severity==='critico'||inf.severity==='grave'?'':inf.severity==='warn'||inf.severity==='moderado'?' warn':' info'; const bgColor=inf.severity==='critico'?'#ffebee':inf.severity==='grave'?'#fff3e0':inf.severity==='moderado'?'#fff8e1':inf.severity==='warn'?'#fff3e0':'#e3f2fd'; const timeStr=inf.time?new Date(inf.time).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'; return `
    ${inf.icon}
    ${inf.title}
    ${inf.detail}
    📍 ${inf.location} · 🕓 ${timeStr}
    ${inf.speed?'
    '+inf.speed+' km/h
    ':''}
    `; }).join(''):'
    No hay eventos de este tipo
    '; } renderInfractions('',''); document.getElementById('rptInfFilter').onchange=function(){renderInfractions(this.value,document.getElementById('rptInfSeverity').value)}; document.getElementById('rptInfSeverity').onchange=function(){renderInfractions(document.getElementById('rptInfFilter').value,this.value)}; // === CHARTS === // Speed events per day safeChart('rptChartSpeedDay',{type:'bar',data:{ labels:chartLabels, datasets:[ {label:'Exceso grave (100+)',data:chartDays.map(d=>dailyData[d]?.speedEvents.filter(e=>e.severity==='grave'||e.severity==='critico').length||0),backgroundColor:'#c62828',borderRadius:4,barThickness:20}, {label:'Vel. elevada (80-99)',data:chartDays.map(d=>dailyData[d]?.speedEvents.filter(e=>e.severity==='moderado').length||0),backgroundColor:'#f57f17',borderRadius:4,barThickness:20} ]},options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{font:{size:11}}}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{stepSize:1}},x:{grid:{display:false},stacked:true}},datasets:{bar:{stacked:true}}}}); // Max speed per day safeChart('rptChartMaxSpeedDay',{type:'line',data:{ labels:chartLabels, datasets:[ {label:'Vel. Maxima',data:chartDays.map(d=>dailyData[d]?.maxSpeed||0),borderColor:'#c62828',backgroundColor:'rgba(198,40,40,.1)',fill:true,tension:.3,pointRadius:4}, {label:'Limite 100 km/h',data:chartDays.map(()=>100),borderColor:'#f57f17',borderDash:[8,4],pointRadius:0,borderWidth:2}, {label:'Limite 80 km/h',data:chartDays.map(()=>80),borderColor:'#2e7d32',borderDash:[4,4],pointRadius:0,borderWidth:1} ]},options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{font:{size:11}}}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{callback:v=>v+' km/h'}},x:{grid:{display:false}}}}}); // Infractions by type const typeCounts={speed:totalSpeedEvents,night:nightDrivingEvents,idle:longIdleEvents,fatigue:longDriveEvents,short:shortTripEvents}; safeChart('rptChartInfType',{type:'doughnut',data:{ labels:['Exceso velocidad','Nocturno','Ralenti','Sin descanso','Viajes cortos'], datasets:[{data:[typeCounts.speed,typeCounts.night,typeCounts.idle,typeCounts.fatigue,typeCounts.short],backgroundColor:['#c62828','#1565c0','#ff6f00','#e65100','#757575'],borderWidth:2,borderColor:'#fff'}] },options:{responsive:true,cutout:'60%',plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{font:{size:11}}}}}}); // Daily score safeChart('rptChartScoreDay',{type:'line',data:{ labels:chartLabels, datasets:[{label:'Score',data:dailyScores.slice().reverse(),borderColor:'#1a237e',backgroundColor:'rgba(26,35,126,.1)',fill:true,tension:.3,pointRadius:5,pointBackgroundColor:dailyScores.slice().reverse().map(s=>s>=80?'#2e7d32':s>=60?'#f57f17':s>=40?'#e65100':'#c62828')}] },options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{y:{min:0,max:100,ticks:{callback:v=>v+'pts'}},x:{grid:{display:false}}}}}); } function renderRptMapa(container,unitInfo){ container.innerHTML=`
    Recorrido Inicio viaje Fin viaje Parada
    `; setTimeout(()=>{ if(rptRouteMap){rptRouteMap.remove();rptRouteMap=null} rptRouteMap=L.map('rptRouteMap',{zoomControl:true}).setView([8.98,-79.52],10); L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png',{attribution:'© OpenStreetMap',maxZoom:19}).addTo(rptRouteMap); const bounds=[]; const routes=rptCurrentData.filter(r=>r.type==='route'); const stops=rptCurrentData.filter(r=>r.type==='stop'); // Draw route lines (connect start→end for each route) routes.forEach((r,i)=>{ if(!r.start?.lat||!r.end?.lat) return; const line=L.polyline([[r.start.lat,r.start.lng],[r.end.lat,r.end.lng]],{color:'#1a237e',weight:3,opacity:.7,dashArray:i%2===0?null:'8 4'}).addTo(rptRouteMap); bounds.push([r.start.lat,r.start.lng],[r.end.lat,r.end.lng]); // Start marker (green) L.circleMarker([r.start.lat,r.start.lng],{radius:5,fillColor:'#2e7d32',color:'#fff',weight:2,fillOpacity:1}).addTo(rptRouteMap) .bindPopup(`Inicio viaje ${i+1}
    ${new Date(r.start.time).toLocaleString('es-PA')}
    ${r.start.address||''}`); // End marker (red) if(r.end?.lat) L.circleMarker([r.end.lat,r.end.lng],{radius:5,fillColor:'#c62828',color:'#fff',weight:2,fillOpacity:1}).addTo(rptRouteMap) .bindPopup(`Fin viaje ${i+1}
    ${((r.distance||0)/1000).toFixed(1)} km · Max ${r.max_speed||0} km/h
    ${new Date(r.end.time).toLocaleString('es-PA')}
    ${r.end.address||''}`); }); // Stop markers (orange) const stopAddrs=new Set(); stops.forEach(s=>{ if(!s.start?.lat) return; const key=s.start.lat.toFixed(3)+','+s.start.lng.toFixed(3); if(stopAddrs.has(key)) return; stopAddrs.add(key); const dur=s.start?.time&&s.end?.time?formatDuration((new Date(s.end.time)-new Date(s.start.time))/1000):'--'; L.circleMarker([s.start.lat,s.start.lng],{radius:7,fillColor:'#ff6f00',color:'#fff',weight:2,fillOpacity:.9}).addTo(rptRouteMap) .bindPopup(`Parada
    ${s.start.address||''}
    Duracion: ${dur}`); bounds.push([s.start.lat,s.start.lng]); }); if(bounds.length) rptRouteMap.fitBounds(bounds,{padding:[40,40]}); },200); } function renderRptTabla(container){ container.innerHTML=`

    📋 Todos los Eventos (${rptCurrentData.length})

    ${rptCurrentData.map((r,i)=>{ const isRoute=r.type==='route'; const dur=r.start?.time&&r.end?.time?formatDuration((new Date(r.end.time)-new Date(r.start.time))/1000):'--'; const km=isRoute?((r.distance||0)/1000).toFixed(1)+' km':'--'; const spdColor=r.max_speed>100?'var(--danger)':r.max_speed>80?'var(--warning)':'var(--text)'; return ``; }).join('')}
    #TipoInicioFinDuracionDistanciaVel. PromVel. MaxOrigenDestino
    ${i+1} ${isRoute?'Recorrido':'Parada'} ${r.start?.time?new Date(r.start.time).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'} ${r.end?.time?new Date(r.end.time).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'} ${dur} ${km} ${isRoute?(r.avg_speed||0)+' km/h':'--'} ${isRoute?(r.max_speed||0)+' km/h':'--'} ${r.start?.address||'--'} ${r.end?.address||'--'}
    `; } function exportRptCSV(){ const unitId=document.getElementById('rptVehicle').value; const unitInfo=gpsUnitsData.find(u=>u.unit_id==unitId); const veh=unitInfo?unitInfo.label+' '+unitInfo.placaFlota:'Vehiculo'; let csv='Tipo,Inicio,Fin,Duracion (min),Distancia (km),Vel Promedio,Vel Maxima,Origen,Destino\n'; rptCurrentData.forEach(r=>{ const isRoute=r.type==='route'; const dur=r.start?.time&&r.end?.time?Math.round((new Date(r.end.time)-new Date(r.start.time))/60000):''; const km=isRoute?((r.distance||0)/1000).toFixed(1):''; const row=[ isRoute?'Recorrido':'Parada', r.start?.time||'',r.end?.time||'',dur,km, isRoute?(r.avg_speed||0):'',isRoute?(r.max_speed||0):'', '"'+(r.start?.address||'').replace(/"/g,"'")+'"', '"'+(r.end?.address||'').replace(/"/g,"'")+'"' ]; csv+=row.join(',')+'\n'; }); const blob=new Blob(['\ufeff'+csv],{type:'text/csv;charset=utf-8;'}); const link=document.createElement('a'); link.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob); link.download='Reporte_'+veh.replace(/\s+/g,'_')+'_'+new Date().toISOString().substring(0,10)+'.csv'; link.click(); } // Re-render map when switching to GPS page const _origNavHandler=true; document.querySelectorAll('.sidebar nav a').forEach(a=>{ a.addEventListener('click',()=>{ if(a.dataset.page==='gps'){ setTimeout(()=>{if(gpsMap) gpsMap.invalidateSize();},300); } }); }); // ===== INIT ===== const _pageMap={renderDashboard:'dashboard',renderFlota:'flota',renderMant:'mantenimiento',renderGastos:'gastos',renderCombustible:'combustible',renderReportes:'reportes',renderReemplazo:'reemplazo',renderGPS:'gps'}; [renderDashboard,renderFlota,renderMant,renderGastos,renderCombustible,renderReportes,renderReemplazo,renderGPS].forEach(fn=>{ try{fn()}catch(e){ console.error('Error en '+fn.name+':',e); const pg=document.getElementById('page-'+(_pageMap[fn.name]||'')); if(pg)pg.innerHTML='

    Error en '+fn.name+'

    '+e.message+'\n\n'+e.stack+'

    '; } }); +v.toFixed(0)+' '+p+'%':''}}}}}); } // Add gasto modal const modal=document.getElementById('gastosModal'); const modalBody=document.getElementById('gastosModalBody'); const gmOverlay=modal.querySelector('.gm-overlay'); document.getElementById('gastosModalClose').onclick=()=>modal.style.display='none'; document.getElementById('gastosModalCancel').onclick=()=>modal.style.display='none'; gmOverlay.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===gmOverlay)modal.style.display='none'}); function openGastoModal(item,catName){ const isEdit=!!item; document.getElementById('gastosModalTitle').textContent=isEdit?'Editar — '+catName:'Registrar Trabajo'; document.getElementById('gastosModalSave').innerHTML=isEdit?'✅ Guardar Cambios':'✅ Registrar Trabajo'; const catDefs=[ {key:'Reparación',icon:'🔧',label:'Reparación'}, {key:'Mantenimiento',icon:'⚙',label:'Mantenimiento'}, {key:'Llantas',icon:'🚸',label:'Llantas'}, {key:'Multas',icon:'🚨',label:'Multa'} ]; const selCat=item?item._cat||catName||'Reparación':'Reparación'; // Build vehicle options: "Vehiculo Modelo — Placa (Empresa)" const vehOptions=flota.map(v=>{ const name=((v.vehiculo||'')+' '+(v.modelo||'')).trim(); return {value:v.placa,label:name+' — '+v.placa,name:name,placa:v.placa,empresa:v.empresa||''}; }).sort((a,b)=>a.label.localeCompare(b.label)); // Build proveedor list from existing data const provSet=new Set(); [...costos,...reparaciones,...llantas,...multas].forEach(g=>{if(g.proveedor)provSet.add(g.proveedor)}); const provOpts=[...provSet].sort(); const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const curPlaca=item?item.placa||'':''; const curFecha=item?item.fecha||today:today; const curCosto=item?(item.costo||'0'):''; const curProv=item?item.proveedor||'':''; const curTrabajo=item?item.trabajo||item.multa||'':''; let html=''; // Tipo de trabajo - card buttons html+='TIPO DE TRABAJO'; html+='
    '; catDefs.forEach(c=>{ html+='
    '; html+=''+c.icon+''+c.label+'
    '; }); html+='
    '; // Placa del vehículo html+='
    '; html+='PLACA DEL VEHÍCULO *'; html+='
    '; // Fecha + Costo en fila html+='
    '; html+='
    FECHA *'; html+='
    '; html+='
    COSTO TOTAL ($) *'; html+='
    '; html+='
    '; // Proveedor html+='
    PROVEEDOR / TALLER'; html+='
    '; // Descripción del trabajo html+='
    DESCRIPCIÓN DEL TRABAJO'; html+='
    '; modalBody.innerHTML=html; // Category button interaction let selectedCat=selCat; modalBody.querySelectorAll('.gm-cat-btn').forEach(btn=>{ btn.addEventListener('click',function(){ modalBody.querySelectorAll('.gm-cat-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); this.classList.add('active'); selectedCat=this.dataset.cat; }); }); modal.style.display='block'; document.getElementById('gastosModalSave').onclick=function(){ const inputs=modalBody.querySelectorAll('[data-field]'); const obj={}; inputs.forEach(inp=>{obj[inp.dataset.field]=inp.value.trim()}); if(!obj.placa||!obj.fecha){alert('Placa y fecha son requeridos');return} // Get vehiculo name from selected option const placaSel=modalBody.querySelector('[data-field="placa"]'); const selOpt=placaSel.options[placaSel.selectedIndex]; if(selOpt&&selOpt.dataset.veh) obj.vehiculo=selOpt.dataset.veh; if(selOpt&&selOpt.dataset.emp) obj.depto=selOpt.dataset.emp; obj.costo=parseFloat(obj.costo)||0; const cat=selectedCat; if(cat==='Reparación')reparaciones.push(obj); else if(cat==='Mantenimiento')costos.push(obj); else if(cat==='Llantas')llantas.push(obj); else multas.push({...obj,multa:obj.trabajo}); saveGastosLocal(); modal.style.display='none'; renderGastos(); }; } document.getElementById('gastosAddBtn').onclick=()=>openGastoModal(null,null); window.editGasto=function(cat,placa,fecha){ let arr=cat==='Reparación'?reparaciones:cat==='Mantenimiento'?costos:cat==='Llantas'?llantas:multas; const item=arr.find(g=>g.placa===placa&&g.fecha===fecha); if(item)openGastoModal({...item,_cat:cat},cat); }; window.deleteGasto=function(cat,placa,fecha,costo){ if(!confirm('¿Eliminar este registro?'))return; let arr=cat==='Reparación'?reparaciones:cat==='Mantenimiento'?costos:cat==='Llantas'?llantas:multas; const idx=arr.findIndex(g=>g.placa===placa&&g.fecha===fecha&&(parseFloat(g.costo)||0)===parseFloat(costo)); if(idx>-1){arr.splice(idx,1);saveGastosLocal();renderGastos()} }; renderGastosTable(); } // ===== COMBUSTIBLE ===== function renderCombustible(){ const totalL=sumField(combustible,'litros'); const totalM=sumField(combustible,'monto'); const totalCargas=combustible.length; const uniquePlacas=[...new Set(combustible.map(c=>c.placa))]; const numVeh=uniquePlacas.length; // Monthly data const byMonth={}; combustible.forEach(c=>{if(c.fecha){const m=c.fecha.substring(0,7);if(!byMonth[m])byMonth[m]={monto:0,litros:0,cargas:0};byMonth[m].monto+=(parseFloat(c.monto)||0);byMonth[m].litros+=(parseFloat(c.litros)||0);byMonth[m].cargas++}}); const sortedMonths=Object.keys(byMonth).sort(); const numMonths=sortedMonths.length||1; const promMensual=totalM/numMonths; const precioLitro=totalL>0?totalM/totalL:0; const costoPromCarga=totalCargas>0?totalM/totalCargas:0; const litrosPromCarga=totalCargas>0?totalL/totalCargas:0; const litrosPromVeh=numVeh>0?totalL/numVeh:0; const cargasPromVeh=numVeh>0?Math.round(totalCargas/numVeh):0; // Top consumer const byPlaca=groupBy(combustible,'placa'); const placaStats=Object.entries(byPlaca).map(([p,arr])=>({placa:p,litros:sumField(arr,'litros'),monto:sumField(arr,'monto'),cargas:arr.length,conductor:arr[0]?.conductor||'',depto:arr[0]?.depto||''})).sort((a,b)=>b.monto-a.monto); const topConsumer=placaStats[0]||{placa:'—',monto:0}; // By conductor const byCond={}; combustible.forEach(c=>{const k=c.conductor||'?';if(!byCond[k])byCond[k]={conductor:k,litros:0,monto:0,cargas:0,depto:c.depto||''};byCond[k].litros+=(parseFloat(c.litros)||0);byCond[k].monto+=(parseFloat(c.monto)||0);byCond[k].cargas++}); const condStats=Object.values(byCond).sort((a,b)=>b.monto-a.monto); // By depto const byDepto=groupBy(combustible,'depto'); const deptoStats=Object.entries(byDepto).map(([d,arr])=>({depto:d,litros:sumField(arr,'litros'),monto:sumField(arr,'monto')})).sort((a,b)=>b.litros-a.litros); // Divisions const divisions=[...new Set(combustible.map(c=>c.depto).filter(Boolean))].sort(); // Month labels - use global fmtMes const fmtMonth=fmtMes; // Variation table const variations=sortedMonths.map((m,i)=>{ const d=byMonth[m]; const prev=i>0?byMonth[sortedMonths[i-1]]:null; const montoChg=prev?((d.monto-prev.monto)/prev.monto*100):null; const litrosChg=prev?((d.litros-prev.litros)/prev.litros*100):null; const cargasChg=prev?((d.cargas-prev.cargas)/prev.cargas*100):null; return {mes:fmtMonth(m),monto:d.monto,litros:d.litros,cargas:d.cargas,montoChg,litrosChg,cargasChg}; }); const container=document.getElementById('fuelPageContent'); container.innerHTML=`

    ⛽ Análisis de Combustible

    ${fmtMonth(sortedMonths[0]||'')} — ${fmtMonth(sortedMonths[sortedMonths.length-1]||'')}

    Gasto Total
    ${fmt$(totalM)}
     
    Litros Totales
    ${fmtN(totalL)}
    ${totalCargas} cargas
    Promedio Mensual
    ${fmt$(promMensual)}
     
    Precio Prom/Litro
    ${fmt$(precioLitro)}
     
    Vehiculos c/Carga
    ${numVeh}
    ${cargasPromVeh} cargas/veh prom
    Costo Prom/Carga
    ${fmt$(costoPromCarga)}
    ${fmtN(litrosPromCarga)} L/carga
    Litros Prom/Vehiculo
    ${fmtN(litrosPromVeh)}
    en ${numMonths} meses
    Mayor Consumidor
    ${topConsumer.placa}
    ${fmt$(topConsumer.monto)}

    📊 Tendencia Mensual — Monto y Litros

    📊 Cargas y Costo por Carga

    📊 Gasto por Departamento

    📊 Variacion Mes a Mes

    ${variations.map(v=>``).join('')}
    MesMontoΔLitrosΔCargasΔ
    ${v.mes} ${fmt$(v.monto)} ${v.montoChg!==null?''+( v.montoChg>=0?'+':'')+v.montoChg.toFixed(1)+'%':'—'} ${fmtN(v.litros)} ${v.litrosChg!==null?''+( v.litrosChg>=0?'+':'')+v.litrosChg.toFixed(1)+'%':'—'} ${v.cargas} ${v.cargasChg!==null?''+( v.cargasChg>=0?'+':'')+v.cargasChg.toFixed(1)+'%':'—'}

    📊 Top Vehiculos por Consumo

    PlacaConductorDiv.LitrosMontoCargas

    📊 Top Conductores por Consumo

    ConductorDiv.LitrosMontoCargas

    📊 Detalle Mensual

    ${sortedMonths.map(m=>{const d=byMonth[m];return ``}).join('')}
    MesCargasLitrosMonto$/Litro$/CargaL/Carga
    ${fmtMonth(m)}${d.cargas}${fmtN(d.litros)} ${fmt$(d.monto)}${fmt$(d.litros>0?d.monto/d.litros:0)} ${fmt$(d.cargas>0?d.monto/d.cargas:0)}${fmtN(d.cargas>0?d.litros/d.cargas:0)}
    FechaHoraPlacaDeptoConductorEstacionProductoLitrosMonto
    Total: 0 registros | Litros: 0 | Monto: $0
    PlacaConductorDepartamentoCargasLitrosMonto$/CargaL/Carga
    `; // Render top vehicles table function renderTopVeh(data){ document.getElementById('fuelTopVehBody').innerHTML=data.slice(0,15).map(v=>` ${v.placa} ${v.conductor} ${v.depto} ${fmtN(v.litros)} ${fmt$(v.monto)} ${v.cargas} `).join(''); } renderTopVeh(placaStats); // Render top conductors function renderTopCond(data){ document.getElementById('fuelTopCondBody').innerHTML=data.slice(0,15).map(c=>` ${c.conductor} ${c.depto} ${fmtN(c.litros)} ${fmt$(c.monto)} ${c.cargas} `).join(''); } renderTopCond(condStats); // Charts // Trend chart - dual axis monto + litros safeChart('fuelChartTrend',{type:'bar',data:{ labels:sortedMonths.map(fmtMonth), datasets:[ {label:'Monto',data:sortedMonths.map(m=>byMonth[m].monto),backgroundColor:'#1565c0',borderRadius:4,order:1,yAxisID:'y'}, {label:'Litros',data:sortedMonths.map(m=>byMonth[m].litros),type:'bar',backgroundColor:'#2e7d32',borderRadius:4,order:2,yAxisID:'y1'} ] },options:{responsive:true,scales:{y:{position:'left',ticks:{callback:v=>'$'+fmtN(v)}},y1:{position:'right',grid:{display:false},ticks:{callback:v=>fmtN(v)+'L'}}}}}); // Cargas + costo/carga chart safeChart('fuelChartCargas',{type:'bar',data:{ labels:sortedMonths.map(fmtMonth), datasets:[ {label:'Cargas',data:sortedMonths.map(m=>byMonth[m].cargas),backgroundColor:'#7c4dff',borderRadius:4,yAxisID:'y'}, {label:'$/Carga',data:sortedMonths.map(m=>byMonth[m].cargas>0?byMonth[m].monto/byMonth[m].cargas:0),backgroundColor:'#ff9800',borderRadius:4,yAxisID:'y1'} ] },options:{responsive:true,scales:{y:{position:'left'},y1:{position:'right',grid:{display:false},ticks:{callback:v=>'$'+v.toFixed(0)}}}}}); // Depto chart safeChart('fuelChartDepto',{type:'bar',data:{ labels:deptoStats.map(d=>d.depto), datasets:[{label:'Litros',data:deptoStats.map(d=>d.litros),backgroundColor:'#2e7d32',borderRadius:4}] },options:{responsive:true,indexAxis:'y',plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{ticks:{callback:v=>fmtN(v)}}}}}); // Tab switching document.querySelectorAll('#fuelTabs button').forEach(btn=>{ btn.addEventListener('click',()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#fuelTabs button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); ['general','mensual','diaria','vehiculo'].forEach(t=>{ const el=document.getElementById('ftab-'+t); if(el)el.style.display=t===btn.dataset.ftab?'block':'none'; }); }); }); // Daily view filter function renderDaily(){ const cd=document.getElementById('cDepto').value; const cm=document.getElementById('cMes').value; const cb=document.getElementById('cBuscar').value.toLowerCase(); const filtered=combustible.filter(c=>{ if(cd&&c.depto!==cd)return false; if(cm&&c.fecha&&!c.fecha.startsWith(cm))return false; if(cb&&!JSON.stringify(c).toLowerCase().includes(cb))return false;return true; }); document.getElementById('fuelDailyBody').innerHTML=filtered.slice(0,500).map(c=>` ${c.fecha||''}${c.hora||''}${c.placa}${c.depto||''} ${c.conductor||''}${c.estacion||''}${c.producto||''} ${fmtN(c.litros)}${fmt$(c.monto)} `).join(''); document.getElementById('fuelDailyCount').textContent=filtered.length+(filtered.length>500?' (mostrando 500)':''); document.getElementById('fuelDailyL').textContent=fmtN(sumField(filtered,'litros')); document.getElementById('fuelDailyM').textContent=fmt$(sumField(filtered,'monto')); } ['cDepto','cMes','cBuscar'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.addEventListener(id==='cBuscar'?'input':'change',renderDaily)}); renderDaily(); // Vehicle view filter function renderVehView(){ const q=document.getElementById('cVehBuscar').value.toLowerCase(); const filtered=q?placaStats.filter(v=>(v.placa+v.conductor+v.depto).toLowerCase().includes(q)):placaStats; document.getElementById('fuelVehBody').innerHTML=filtered.map(v=>` ${v.placa} ${v.conductor}${v.depto}${v.cargas} ${fmtN(v.litros)}${fmt$(v.monto)} ${fmt$(v.cargas>0?v.monto/v.cargas:0)}${fmtN(v.cargas>0?v.litros/v.cargas:0)} `).join(''); } document.getElementById('cVehBuscar').addEventListener('input',renderVehView); renderVehView(); // Division filter document.getElementById('cDivFilter').addEventListener('change',function(){ // This would require re-render with filtered data - simplified approach // For now just filter the top tables const div=this.value; const filteredPlaca=div?placaStats.filter(v=>v.depto===div):placaStats; const filteredCond=div?condStats.filter(c=>c.depto===div):condStats; renderTopVeh(filteredPlaca); renderTopCond(filteredCond); }); } // ===== REPORTES ===== function renderReportes(){ // Costo por vehiculo const allG=[...costos,...reparaciones,...llantas]; const byVeh={}; allG.forEach(g=>{const k=g.placa||'?';byVeh[k]=(byVeh[k]||0)+(parseFloat(g.costo)||0)}); const topVeh=Object.entries(byVeh).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,15); safeChart('chartCostoVeh',{type:'bar',data:{labels:topVeh.map(t=>t[0]),datasets:[{label:'Costo Total',data:topVeh.map(t=>t[1]),backgroundColor:'#1565c0'}]},options:{responsive:true,indexAxis:'y',scales:{x:{ticks:{callback:v=>'$'+v}}}}}); // Proveedor const byProv=groupBy([...costos,...reparaciones],'proveedor'); const provData=Object.entries(byProv).map(([k,v])=>({prov:k,total:sumField(v,'costo')})).sort((a,b)=>b.total-a.total); safeChart('chartProveedor',{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:provData.map(p=>p.prov),datasets:[{data:provData.map(p=>p.total),backgroundColor:COLORS}]},options:{responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{position:'right'}}}}); // Comparativo const meses=new Set(); costos.forEach(c=>{if(c.fecha)meses.add(c.fecha.substring(0,7))}); reparaciones.forEach(r=>{if(r.fecha)meses.add(r.fecha.substring(0,7))}); const sortedM=[...meses].sort(); const mantByM={},repByM={}; costos.forEach(c=>{if(c.fecha){const m=c.fecha.substring(0,7);mantByM[m]=(mantByM[m]||0)+(parseFloat(c.costo)||0)}}); reparaciones.forEach(r=>{if(r.fecha){const m=r.fecha.substring(0,7);repByM[m]=(repByM[m]||0)+(parseFloat(r.costo)||0)}}); safeChart('chartCompare',{type:'bar',data:{labels:sortedM.map(fmtMes),datasets:[{label:'Mantenimiento',data:sortedM.map(m=>mantByM[m]||0),backgroundColor:'#1565c0'},{label:'Reparaciones',data:sortedM.map(m=>repByM[m]||0),backgroundColor:'#ff6f00'}]},options:{responsive:true,scales:{y:{ticks:{callback:v=>'$'+v}}}}}); // Top fuel vehicles const fByPlaca=groupBy(combustible,'placa'); const topFuel=Object.entries(fByPlaca).map(([p,arr])=>({placa:p,litros:sumField(arr,'litros'),monto:sumField(arr,'monto')})).sort((a,b)=>b.monto-a.monto).slice(0,15); safeChart('chartFuelVeh',{type:'bar',data:{labels:topFuel.map(t=>t.placa),datasets:[{label:'Monto ($)',data:topFuel.map(t=>t.monto),backgroundColor:'#2e7d32'}]},options:{responsive:true,indexAxis:'y',scales:{x:{ticks:{callback:v=>'$'+v}}}}}); } // ===== UTILS ===== function gv(id){return document.getElementById(id).value} function fillSelect(id,opts){const el=document.getElementById(id);const first=el.options[0].text;el.innerHTML=''+opts.map(o=>'').join('')} // ===== IMPORTAR COMBUSTIBLE ===== function handleFuelImport(input){ const file=input.files[0]; if(!file) return; document.getElementById('fuelFileName').textContent=file.name; const status=document.getElementById('fuelImportStatus'); const preview=document.getElementById('fuelPreview'); status.style.display='block'; status.innerHTML='
    ⏳ Procesando archivo...
    '; const reader=new FileReader(); reader.onload=function(e){ try{ const data=new Uint8Array(e.target.result); const wb=XLSX.read(data,{type:'array',cellDates:false}); const ws=wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const rows=XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(ws,{header:1}); if(rows.length<2){status.innerHTML='
    ⚠ El archivo no contiene datos
    ';return;} const headers=rows[0].map(h=>(h||'').toString().trim().toLowerCase()); const iF=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('fecha')); const iH=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('hora')); const iP=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('placa')); const iD=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('depart')||h.includes('depto')); const iC=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('conductor')); const iE=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('estaci')); const iPr=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('producto')); const iL=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('litro')); const iM=headers.findIndex(h=>h.includes('monto')); if(iF<0||iP<0||iL<0||iM<0){status.innerHTML='
    ⚠ No se encontraron las columnas requeridas (Fecha, Placa, Litros, Monto)
    ';return;} const newData=[]; for(let i=1;i=0&&r[iH]?String(r[iH]).trim():''; newData.push({ fecha:fecha, hora:hora, placa:iP>=0?String(r[iP]||'').trim():'', depto:iD>=0?String(r[iD]||'').trim():'', conductor:iC>=0?String(r[iC]||'').trim():'', estacion:iE>=0?String(r[iE]||'').trim():'', producto:iPr>=0?String(r[iPr]||'').trim():'', litros:iL>=0?parseFloat(r[iL])||0:0, monto:iM>=0?parseFloat(r[iM])||0:0 }); } if(newData.length===0){status.innerHTML='
    ⚠ No se pudieron extraer registros del archivo
    ';return;} combustible=newData; try{localStorage.setItem('combustibleData',JSON.stringify(newData))}catch(e){}saveCombustibleFB() const totalLitros=newData.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.litros,0); const totalMonto=newData.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.monto,0); const fechas=[...new Set(newData.map(r=>r.fecha))].sort(); status.innerHTML='
    ✅ Importacion exitosa! Se cargaron '+newData.length+' registros de combustible.
    '; preview.style.display='block'; preview.innerHTML='
    '+ '
    Registros
    '+newData.length.toLocaleString()+'
    transacciones importadas
    '+ '
    Total Litros
    '+totalLitros.toLocaleString('es',{maximumFractionDigits:0})+'
    litros de combustible
    '+ '
    Total Gasto
    $'+totalMonto.toLocaleString('es',{maximumFractionDigits:2})+'
    en combustible
    '+ '
    Periodo
    '+fechas[0]+' a '+fechas[fechas.length-1]+'
    '+(fechas.length)+' dias con datos
    '+ '
    '+ '

    Los datos de Combustible y Dashboard se han actualizado automaticamente.

    '; destroyAllCharts(); renderDashboard(); renderCombustible(); }catch(err){ status.innerHTML='
    ⚠ Error al procesar: '+err.message+'
    '; } }; reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file); } (function(){try{const s=localStorage.getItem('combustibleData');if(s){combustible=JSON.parse(s)}}catch(e){}})(); // ===== REEMPLAZO ===== function renderReemplazo(){ const currentYear=2026; const currentMonth=2; // Febrero 2026 based on data // Build vehicle scores const repByPlaca={}; reparaciones.forEach(r=>{ const p=r.placa; if(!repByPlaca[p])repByPlaca[p]={count:0,total:0,items:[]}; repByPlaca[p].count++; repByPlaca[p].total+=parseFloat(r.costo)||0; repByPlaca[p].items.push(r); }); // Also count costos (maintenance) as fallas const costByPlaca={}; costos.forEach(c=>{ const p=c.placa; if(!costByPlaca[p])costByPlaca[p]={count:0,total:0}; costByPlaca[p].count++; costByPlaca[p].total+=parseFloat(c.costo)||0; }); const scored=flota.map(v=>{ const age=currentYear-parseInt(v.ano||currentYear); // Antigüedad: 25 pts max, 10+ años = máximo const ageScore=Math.min(25,Math.round((age/10)*25)); // Costo reparaciones: 30 pts max, $2000+ = máximo const repData=repByPlaca[v.placa]||{count:0,total:0}; const costData=costByPlaca[v.placa]||{count:0,total:0}; const totalRepCost=repData.total; const costScore=Math.min(30,Math.round((totalRepCost/2000)*30)); // Frecuencia fallas: 25 pts max, 6+ visitas = máximo const totalVisits=repData.count+costData.count; const freqScore=Math.min(25,Math.round((totalVisits/6)*25)); // Kilometraje estimado: 20 pts max, 200k+ = máximo (estimate based on age) const estKm=age*20000; // ~20k km/year estimate const kmScore=Math.min(20,Math.round((estKm/200000)*20)); const totalScore=ageScore+costScore+freqScore+kmScore; let urgency,urgColor; if(totalScore>=70){urgency='Crítico';urgColor='#ef4444'} else if(totalScore>=50){urgency='Alto';urgColor='#f59e0b'} else if(totalScore>=30){urgency='Medio';urgColor='#3b82f6'} else{urgency='Bajo';urgColor='#22c55e'} return {...v,age,ageScore,costScore,freqScore,kmScore,totalScore,urgency,urgColor,totalRepCost:repData.total,totalVisits,estKm}; }).sort((a,b)=>b.totalScore-a.totalScore); const critico=scored.filter(s=>s.totalScore>=70).length; const alto=scored.filter(s=>s.totalScore>=50&&s.totalScore<70).length; const medio=scored.filter(s=>s.totalScore>=30&&s.totalScore<50).length; const bajo=scored.filter(s=>s.totalScore<30).length; const avgScore=scored.length?Math.round(scored.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.totalScore,0)/scored.length):0; const totalRepGasto=scored.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.totalRepCost,0); // Get unique divisions const divisions=[...new Set(flota.map(v=>v.empresa))].sort(); const container=document.getElementById('reemplazoContent'); container.innerHTML=`

    📈 Análisis de Reemplazo Vehicular

    Cuándo cambiar cada vehículo basado en 4 criterios clave

    Reemplazo Crítico
    ${critico}
    Puntuación 70+
    Prioridad Alta
    ${alto}
    Puntuación 50-69
    Score Promedio
    ${avgScore}
    De 100 puntos
    Gasto Total Reparaciones
    $${totalRepGasto.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2})}
    Acumulado en la flota

    📊 Distribución por Urgencia

    Crítico (70+): ${critico} Alto (50-69): ${alto} Medio (30-49): ${medio} Bajo (0-29): ${bajo}

    📊 Top Vehículos por Gasto en Reparaciones

    📚 Metodología de Puntuación (0-100)

    ⏰
    Antigüedad
    25 pts
    10+ años = máximo
    💰
    Costo Reparaciones
    30 pts
    $2,000+ = máximo
    🔧
    Frecuencia Fallas
    25 pts
    6+ visitas = máximo
    🚗
    Kilometraje Est.
    20 pts
    200k+ km = máximo
    #VehículoPlacaAñoDivisiónConductorScoreAntigüedadCosto Rep.FrecuenciaKm Est.Gasto TotalUrgencia
    Total: ${scored.length} vehículos
    `; // Urgency color map for light theme const urgBadge={Crítico:{bg:'#ffebee',color:'#c62828'},Alto:{bg:'#fff3e0',color:'#e65100'},Medio:{bg:'#e3f2fd',color:'#1565c0'},Bajo:{bg:'#e8f5e9',color:'#2e7d32'}}; function renderTable(data){ const tbody=document.getElementById('rzTableBody'); tbody.innerHTML=data.map((v,i)=>{ const ub=urgBadge[v.urgency]; return ` ${i+1} ${v.modelo} ${v.placa} ${v.ano} ${v.empresa} ${v.conductor} ${v.totalScore}
    ${v.ageScore}/25 ${v.costScore}/30 ${v.freqScore}/25 ${v.kmScore}/20 $${v.totalRepCost.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2})} ${v.urgency} `}).join(''); document.getElementById('rzCount').textContent=data.length; } renderTable(scored); // Filters let activeUrg='',searchTerm='',divFilter=''; function applyFilters(){ let filtered=scored; if(activeUrg)filtered=filtered.filter(v=>v.urgency===activeUrg); if(divFilter)filtered=filtered.filter(v=>v.empresa===divFilter); if(searchTerm){const s=searchTerm.toLowerCase();filtered=filtered.filter(v=>(v.placa+v.modelo+v.conductor).toLowerCase().includes(s))} renderTable(filtered); } document.querySelectorAll('#rzFilters .rz-fbtn').forEach(btn=>{ btn.addEventListener('click',()=>{ document.querySelectorAll('#rzFilters .rz-fbtn').forEach(b=>{b.style.background='var(--card)';b.style.color='var(--text)'}); btn.style.background='var(--primary)';btn.style.color='#fff'; activeUrg=btn.dataset.urg; applyFilters(); }); }); document.getElementById('rzSearch').addEventListener('input',e=>{searchTerm=e.target.value;applyFilters()}); document.getElementById('rzDivision').addEventListener('change',e=>{divFilter=e.target.value;applyFilters()}); // Charts safeChart('rzChartUrgency',{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:['Crítico (70+)','Alto (50-69)','Medio (30-49)','Bajo (0-29)'],datasets:[{data:[critico,alto,medio,bajo],backgroundColor:['#c62828','#f57f17','#1565c0','#2e7d32'],borderWidth:2,borderColor:'#fff'}]},options:{responsive:true,cutout:'65%',plugins:{legend:{display:false}}}}); const top8=scored.filter(v=>v.totalRepCost>0).slice(0,8); safeChart('rzChartTopGasto',{type:'bar',data:{labels:top8.map(v=>v.modelo),datasets:[{data:top8.map(v=>v.totalRepCost),backgroundColor:'#c62828',borderRadius:4,barThickness:28}]},options:{responsive:true,indexAxis:'y',plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{x:{ticks:{callback:v=>'$'+v}},y:{grid:{display:false},ticks:{font:{size:11}}}}}}); } // ===== GPS TRACKING ===== let gpsMap=null, gpsMarkers={}, gpsUnitsData=[], gpsAutoRefresh=null; const SKYDATA_API='https://acceso.skydatalatam.com/api/v1/'; const SKYDATA_KEY='45e4305ce0850c7a2a6182ff0f9edded49605029'; function initGPSMap(){ if(gpsMap) return; gpsMap=L.map('gpsMap',{zoomControl:true}).setView([8.98,-79.52],10); L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png',{ attribution:'© OpenStreetMap',maxZoom:19 }).addTo(gpsMap); } function getStateInfo(state){ if(!state||!state.name) return {label:'Desconocido',color:'#9e9e9e',bg:'#f5f5f5',icon:'?'}; switch(state.name){ case 'driving': return {label:'En movimiento',color:'#2e7d32',bg:'#e8f5e9',icon:'▶'}; case 'stopped': return {label:'Detenido',color:'#f57f17',bg:'#fff8e1',icon:'■'}; case 'idle': return {label:'Motor encendido',color:'#1565c0',bg:'#e3f2fd',icon:'●'}; case 'nodata': return {label:'Sin datos',color:'#c62828',bg:'#ffebee',icon:'✕'}; default: return {label:state.name,color:'#757575',bg:'#f5f5f5',icon:'?'}; } } function formatDuration(seconds){ if(!seconds||seconds<0) return '--'; const h=Math.floor(seconds/3600); const m=Math.floor((seconds%3600)/60); if(h>24){const d=Math.floor(h/24);return d+'d '+(h%24)+'h'} if(h>0) return h+'h '+m+'m'; return m+'min'; } // Build fleet lookup indexes once const _flotaByVin={}, _flotaByPlaca={}, _flotaByPlacaNorm={}; function buildFlotaIndex(){ flota.forEach(v=>{ const vin=(v.chasis||'').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,''); const placa=(v.placa||'').trim().toUpperCase(); const placaNorm=placa.replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,''); if(vin) _flotaByVin[vin]=v; if(placa) _flotaByPlaca[placa]=v; if(placaNorm) _flotaByPlacaNorm[placaNorm]=v; }); } buildFlotaIndex(); function matchFlotaUnit(unit){ // 1) Match by VIN/chasis (most reliable) const vin=(unit.vin||'').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g,''); if(vin&&_flotaByVin[vin]) return _flotaByVin[vin]; // 2) Extract plate from SkyData "number" field // Formats: "5-979487", "6-AF8992", "AT4665", "MJ4448" const rawNum=(unit.number||'').trim().toUpperCase(); const stripped=rawNum.replace(/^\d+-/,''); // remove prefix like "5-" const normNum=stripped.replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,''); // Direct plate match if(stripped&&_flotaByPlaca[stripped]) return _flotaByPlaca[stripped]; // Normalized match (handles spaces, hyphens in fleet data) if(normNum&&_flotaByPlacaNorm[normNum]) return _flotaByPlacaNorm[normNum]; // 3) Fuzzy: check if fleet plate is contained in GPS number or vice versa for(const v of flota){ const fPlaca=(v.placa||'').trim().toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g,''); if(!fPlaca||!normNum) continue; if(fPlaca.length>=4&&normNum.length>=4&&(fPlaca.includes(normNum)||normNum.includes(fPlaca))) return v; } return null; } async function loadGPSData(){ try{ const resp=await fetch(SKYDATA_API+'unit/list.json?key='+SKYDATA_KEY); if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('Error API: '+resp.status); const json=await resp.json(); const units=json.data?.units||json.units||json.data||[]; if(!Array.isArray(units)) throw new Error('Formato de respuesta inesperado'); gpsUnitsData=units.map(u=>{ const matched=matchFlotaUnit(u); return { ...u, flotaMatch:matched, vinculado:!!matched, conductor:matched?matched.conductor:'Sin asignar', empresa:matched?matched.empresa:'--', placaFlota:matched?matched.placa:(u.number||'').replace(/^\d+-/,''), area:matched?matched.area:'--', tipo:matched?matched.tipo:'--', statusFlota:matched?matched.status:'--', numFlota:matched?matched.num:'--', stateInfo:getStateInfo(u.state||u.movement_state) }; }).sort((a,b)=>{ const order={driving:0,idle:1,stopped:2,nodata:3}; return (order[a.state?.name]??9)-(order[b.state?.name]??9); }); renderGPSContent(); initRptVehicleSelect(); document.getElementById('gpsSubtitle').textContent=gpsUnitsData.length+' unidades rastreadas via SkyData'; document.getElementById('gpsLastUpdate').textContent='Actualizado: '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-PA'); }catch(err){ document.getElementById('gpsSubtitle').textContent='Error: '+err.message; document.getElementById('gpsVehicleList').innerHTML='

    ⚠

    '+err.message+'

    Verifica la conexion a internet y el token API

    '; } } function renderGPSContent(){ const units=getFilteredGPS(); const driving=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.state?.name==='driving').length; const stopped=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.state?.name==='stopped'||u.state?.name==='idle').length; const nodata=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.state?.name==='nodata').length; const maxSpeed=Math.max(0,...gpsUnitsData.map(u=>u.speed||0)); const avgSpeed=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.speed>0); const avg=avgSpeed.length?Math.round(avgSpeed.reduce((a,b)=>a+(b.speed||0),0)/avgSpeed.length):0; const vinculados=gpsUnitsData.filter(u=>u.vinculado).length; const sinVincular=gpsUnitsData.length-vinculados; document.getElementById('gpsKpiGrid').innerHTML=`
    ${driving}
    En Movimiento
    ${stopped}
    Detenidos
    ${nodata}
    Sin Datos
    ${gpsUnitsData.length}
    Total Unidades GPS
    ${vinculados}/${gpsUnitsData.length}
    Vinculados a Flota
    ${maxSpeed} km/h
    Vel. Maxima Actual
    `; document.getElementById('gpsVehicleCount').textContent=units.length; document.getElementById('gpsOnlineCount').textContent=driving+' en movimiento'; // Empresa filter const empresas=[...new Set(gpsUnitsData.map(u=>u.empresa).filter(e=>e&&e!=='--'))].sort(); const selEmp=document.getElementById('gpsFilterEmpresa'); const curVal=selEmp.value; selEmp.innerHTML=''+empresas.map(e=>'').join(''); // Vehicle list document.getElementById('gpsVehicleList').innerHTML=units.length?units.map(u=>{ const si=u.stateInfo; return `
    ${u.label}
    ${u.placaFlota} · ${u.conductor}
    ${u.empresa}${u.area&&u.area!=='--'?' · '+u.area:''}
    ${u.speed?u.speed+' km/h':si.label}
    ${u.vinculado?'
    ✓ Vinculado
    ':'
    No vinculado
    '}
    `; }).join(''):'
    No se encontraron vehiculos
    '; // Table document.getElementById('gpsTableBody').innerHTML=units.map((u,i)=>{ const si=u.stateInfo; const lastUp=u.last_update?new Date(u.last_update).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'; const km=u.mileage?Math.round(u.mileage/1000).toLocaleString():'--'; return ` ${i+1} ${u.numFlota!=='--'?u.numFlota:''} ${u.label} ${u.placaFlota} ${u.conductor} ${u.empresa} ${u.area!=='--'?u.area:''} ${si.label} ${u.speed?u.speed+' km/h':'0'} ${km} km ${lastUp} ${u.vinculado?'✓ Si':'✗ No'} `}).join(''); // Map markers updateGPSMarkers(units); } function updateGPSMarkers(units){ // Remove old markers Object.values(gpsMarkers).forEach(m=>gpsMap.removeLayer(m)); gpsMarkers={}; const bounds=[]; units.forEach(u=>{ if(!u.lat||!u.lng) return; const si=u.stateInfo; const icon=L.divIcon({ className:'', html:`
    ${u.state?.name==='driving'?'▶':u.state?.name==='stopped'||u.state?.name==='idle'?'■':'✕'}
    ${u.placaFlota}
    `, iconSize:[32,32],iconAnchor:[16,16] }); const lastUp=u.last_update?new Date(u.last_update).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'; const km=u.mileage?Math.round(u.mileage/1000).toLocaleString():'--'; const dur=formatDuration(u.state?.duration); const marker=L.marker([u.lat,u.lng],{icon}).addTo(gpsMap); marker.bindPopup(`
    ${u.label}
    ${u.vinculado?'VINCULADO':''}
    Placa:${u.placaFlota} Conductor:${u.conductor} Empresa:${u.empresa} ${u.area!=='--'?'Area:'+u.area+'':''} Estado:${si.label} En este estado:${dur} Velocidad:${u.speed||0} km/h Km Total:${km} km Actualizado:${lastUp}
    `,{maxWidth:320}); marker.on('click',()=>selectGPSUnit(u.unit_id)); gpsMarkers[u.unit_id]=marker; bounds.push([u.lat,u.lng]); }); const allBounds=[]; gpsUnitsData.forEach(u=>{if(u.lat&&u.lng) allBounds.push([u.lat,u.lng])}); if(allBounds.length) gpsMap.fitBounds(allBounds,{padding:[40,40],maxZoom:13}); } function selectGPSUnit(uid){ const u=gpsUnitsData.find(x=>x.unit_id===uid); if(!u) return; // Highlight in list document.querySelectorAll('.gps-vehicle-item').forEach(el=>{ el.classList.toggle('selected',el.dataset.uid==uid); }); // Center map if(u.lat&&u.lng){ gpsMap.setView([u.lat,u.lng],16,{animate:true}); if(gpsMarkers[uid]) gpsMarkers[uid].openPopup(); } // Detail panel const si=u.stateInfo; const lastUp=u.last_update?new Date(u.last_update).toLocaleString('es-PA'):'--'; const km=u.mileage?Math.round(u.mileage/1000).toLocaleString():'--'; const dur=formatDuration(u.state?.duration); const ignH=u.ignition_total_time?Math.round(u.ignition_total_time/3600).toLocaleString():'--'; const panel=document.getElementById('gpsDetailPanel'); panel.style.display='block'; const fm=u.flotaMatch; panel.innerHTML=`

    🚗 ${u.label} ${u.numFlota!=='--'?'#'+u.numFlota+'':''}

    Placa: ${u.placaFlota} · Conductor: ${u.conductor} · ${u.empresa}${u.area!=='--'?' · '+u.area:''}

    ${u.vinculado?'✓ Vinculado a Flota':'⚠ No vinculado'} ${si.icon} ${si.label}
    ${u.vinculado?`
    Conductor: ${u.conductor}
    Empresa: ${u.empresa}
    Area: ${u.area}
    Tipo: ${u.tipo}
    Status Flota: ${u.statusFlota}
    ${fm?`
    Ubicacion asignada: ${fm.lugar||'--'}
    `:''}
    `:''}
    Velocidad Actual
    ${u.speed||0} km/h
    Direccion
    ${u.direction||0}°
    Kilometraje Total
    ${km} km
    Tiempo en Estado
    ${dur}
    Horas Motor Total
    ${ignH} h
    Ultima Actualizacion
    ${lastUp}
    VIN / Chasis
    ${u.vin||'--'}
    Coordenadas
    ${u.lat?.toFixed(5)}, ${u.lng?.toFixed(5)}
    `; } function getFilteredGPS(){ let data=[...gpsUnitsData]; const search=(document.getElementById('gpsSearch')?.value||'').toLowerCase(); const status=document.getElementById('gpsFilterStatus')?.value||''; const empresa=document.getElementById('gpsFilterEmpresa')?.value||''; if(search) data=data.filter(u=>(u.label+u.placaFlota+u.conductor+u.empresa+(u.number||'')).toLowerCase().includes(search)); if(status) data=data.filter(u=>u.state?.name===status); if(empresa) data=data.filter(u=>u.empresa===empresa); return data; } function renderGPS(){ initGPSMap(); loadGPSData(); // Auto-refresh every 60 seconds if(gpsAutoRefresh) clearInterval(gpsAutoRefresh); gpsAutoRefresh=setInterval(loadGPSData,60000); // Filters ['gpsSearch','gpsFilterStatus','gpsFilterEmpresa'].forEach(id=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.addEventListener(el.tagName==='INPUT'?'input':'change',()=>renderGPSContent()); }); // Fix map render on page show and fit all vehicles setTimeout(()=>{ if(gpsMap){ gpsMap.invalidateSize(); const bounds=[]; Object.values(gpsMarkers).forEach(m=>{const ll=m.getLatLng();bounds.push([ll.lat,ll.lng])}); if(bounds.length) gpsMap.fitBounds(bounds,{padding:[30,30],maxZoom:14}); } },200); } // ===== REPORTES DE CONDUCCION ===== let rptRouteMap=null,rptRouteLayer=null,rptMarkerLayer=null; let rptCurrentData=[]; function initRptVehicleSelect(){ const sel=document.getElementById('rptVehicle'); if(!sel||!gpsUnitsData.length) return; sel.innerHTML=''+ gpsUnitsData.map(u=>``).join(''); } function getRptDates(){ const quick=document.getElementById('rptQuick').value; const now=new Date(); let from,till; if(quick==='custom'){ from=document.getElementById('rptFrom').value; till=document.getElementById('rptTill').value; if(!from||!till) return null; return {from:from+'T00:00:00Z',till:till+'T23:59:59Z'}; } till=new Date(now);till.setHours(23,59,59); from=new Date(now); switch(quick){ case 'today': from.setHours(0,0,0); break; case 'yesterday': from.setDate(from.getDate()-1);from.setHours(0,0,0);till=new Date(from);till.setHours(23,59,59); break; case '7d': from.setDate(from.getDate()-6);from.setHours(0,0,0); break; case '15d': from.setDate(from.getDate()-14);from.setHours(0,0,0); break; case '30d': from.setDate(from.getDate()-29);from.setHours(0,0,0); break; } return {from:from.toISOString().replace(/\.\d+Z/,'Z'),till:till.toISOString().replace(/\.\d+Z/,'Z')}; } document.getElementById('rptQuick')?.addEventListener('change',function(){ const custom=this.value==='custom'; document.getElementById('rptFrom').style.display=custom?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('rptTill').style.display=custom?'block':'none'; }); // Init hidden document.getElementById('rptFrom')&&(document.getElementById('rptFrom').style.display='none');
